Do not machine washThese uber cool white sneakers from fila are perfect for running, training and urban wear. The mesh uppers make these shoes highly comfortable and breathable while the bright red panels give an added edge. The cushioned lining gives you greater comfort for extended periods of time, while the multi-directional grroves on the lightweight phylon sole ensures excellent grip and stability.
